mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.job_id, a.job_seeker_id, a.resume_id, a.status, a.cover_letter, a.self_intro, a.apply_time, a.create_time, a.update_time, j.job_name, j.job_code, CASE WHEN a.status = 0 THEN '待处理' WHEN a.status = 1 THEN '已查看' WHEN a.status = 2 THEN '面试中' WHEN a.status = 3 THEN '面试中' WHEN a.status = 4 THEN '已录用' WHEN a.status = 5 THEN '未通过' ELSE '未知' END AS status_text FROM recruit_application a LEFT JOIN recruit_job j ON a.job_id = j.id WHERE a.job_seeker_id = #{jobSeekerId} ORDER BY a.apply_time DESC
SELECT a.*, j.job_name, j.job_code FROM recruit_application a LEFT JOIN recruit_job j ON a.job_id = j.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recruit_application (job_id, job_seeker_id, resume_id, status, cover_letter, self_intro, apply_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{request.jobId}, #{jobSeekerId}, #{request.resumeId}, 0, #{request.coverLetter}, #{request.selfIntro}, NOW(), NOW())
